This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] fetchLater() does not accept payload[size=65537] exceeding per-origin quota in a POST request body of String.
  assert_throws_quotaexceedederror: function "() => {\n      fetchLater('/', {\n        activateAfter: 0,\n        method: 'POST',\n        body: makeBeaconData(\n            generatePayload(OVERSIZED_REQUEST_BODY_SIZE), dataType),\n        referrer: '',\n      });\n      // It is difficult to compute the exact requested length, as that depends on\n      // the datatype. Instead, it should always be more than `OVERSIZED_REQUEST_BODY_SIZE`\n      // since we count url and referrer as well\n    }" threw object "QuotaExceededError: Failed to execute 'fetchLater' on 'Window': fetchLater exceeds its quota for the origin: got 65604 bytes, expected less than 65536 bytes." that is not a correct QuotaExceededError: property "quota" is equal to null, expected 65536
[FAIL] fetchLater() does not accept payload[size=65537] exceeding per-origin quota in a POST request body of ArrayBuffer.
  assert_throws_quotaexceedederror: function "() => {\n      fetchLater('/', {\n        activateAfter: 0,\n        method: 'POST',\n        body: makeBeaconData(\n            generatePayload(OVERSIZED_REQUEST_BODY_SIZE), dataType),\n        referrer: '',\n      });\n      // It is difficult to compute the exact requested length, as that depends on\n      // the datatype. Instead, it should always be more than `OVERSIZED_REQUEST_BODY_SIZE`\n      // since we count url and referrer as well\n    }" threw object "QuotaExceededError: Failed to execute 'fetchLater' on 'Window': fetchLater exceeds its quota for the origin: got 65568 bytes, expected less than 65536 bytes." that is not a correct QuotaExceededError: property "quota" is equal to null, expected 65536

Harness: the test ran to completion.
